title: hieracium substellatum subsp. floccibifidum
intro: Hieracium substellatum subsp. floccibifidum, also known as a subspecies of the hawkweed plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help to reduce pain and swelling, and prevent infections. The health benefits of Hieracium substellatum subsp. floccibifidum include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
